allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'firebase' in k.lower\(\) or 'firestore' in k.lower\(\) or 'auth' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(xcodebuild -workspace ios/TodoWeather.xcworkspace -scheme TodoWeather -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\)]")
